records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how hard you try, you will never stand on the same stage as me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how hard you try, you will never stand on the same stage as me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how hard you try, you will never stand on the same stage as me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So let this moment sink in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So let this moment sink in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So let this moment sink in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your emotion, your shame, and your inferiority as a species... The end of a bottomless despair.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your emotion, your shame, and your inferiority as a species... The end of a bottomless despair.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your emotion, your shame, and your inferiority as a species... The end of a bottomless despair.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Again, passing information to another of your kind upon death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Again, passing information to another of your kind upon death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Again, passing information to another of your kind upon death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you don't die, it will be a worthless attempt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you don't die, it will be a worthless attempt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you don't die, it will be a worthless attempt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is within my mirror. The world of <color=#ffd34c>Panorama</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is within my mirror. The world of <color=#ffd34c>Panorama</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is within my mirror. The world of <color=#ffd34c>Panorama</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a piece of the forgotten world that I obtained through a contract with <color=#ffd34c>the Demon Lord</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a piece of the forgotten world that I obtained through a contract with <color=#ffd34c>the Demon Lord</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a piece of the forgotten world that I obtained through a contract with <color=#ffd34c>the Demon Lord</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. That is a reflection of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. That is a reflection of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. That is a reflection of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With time and space cut off from the world, you will face an exact version of yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With time and space cut off from the world, you will face an exact version of yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With time and space cut off from the world, you will face an exact version of yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until you give up everything and completely submit to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until you give up everything and completely submit to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until you give up everything and completely submit to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will prepare a stage for you soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will prepare a stage for you soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will prepare a stage for you soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until I call for you, rehearse your role in here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until I call for you, rehearse your role in here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until I call for you, rehearse your role in here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Swan, where are you right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Swan, where are you right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Swan, where are you right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's waiting on you for the shoot! How could you suddenly leave without saying a word?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's waiting on you for the shoot! How could you suddenly leave without saying a word?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's waiting on you for the shoot! How could you suddenly leave without saying a word?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was revising the script because I found someone perfect for the new role.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was revising the script because I found someone perfect for the new role.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was revising the script because I found someone perfect for the new role.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe this will allow us to tell the story more easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe this will allow us to tell the story more easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe this will allow us to tell the story more easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Casting has already been fixed! But you want to change roles again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Casting has already been fixed! But you want to change roles again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Casting has already been fixed! But you want to change roles again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't I tell you to not raise your voice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't I tell you to not raise your voice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't I tell you to not raise your voice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who was the one who helped you stay in this industry despite your meager talents, hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who was the one who helped you stay in this industry despite your meager talents, hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who was the one who helped you stay in this industry despite your meager talents, hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who was the one who denied your allegations in the scandal involving Jehuty Biotech?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who was the one who denied your allegations in the scandal involving Jehuty Biotech?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who was the one who denied your allegations in the scandal involving Jehuty Biotech?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. There is nothing to be sorry about. There's only one reason I hired you as my manager.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. There is nothing to be sorry about. There's only one reason I hired you as my manager.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. There is nothing to be sorry about. There's only one reason I hired you as my manager.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're someone who knows your place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're someone who knows your place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're someone who knows your place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go tell this to the director.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go tell this to the director.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go tell this to the director.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are going to change locations according to the revised script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are going to change locations according to the revised script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are going to change locations according to the revised script.
